measurement_policy: Fresh values are recorded only from executed commands. Historical artifacts are explicitly labeled and are not presented as fresh runs.

fresh_execution.environment: GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest (Linux 6.17 Azure x86_64), CPython 3.13.14
notes: The shared Codex Windows host still denied local process creation, so all fresh command evidence was collected on the isolated branch runner.
The unfiltered suite retains 11 pre-existing failures; Phase 42 related, fast, requested backend, routing, clarification/unsupported, and frontend metadata checks have no new failures.

backend_requested_full.notes: backend/pytest.ini addopts excludes benchmark, audit, frontend, and slow markers, so this requested command is not an unfiltered full suite.

backend_unfiltered_full.notes: All 11 failures are pre-existing on main: one Korean quality verification failure, six repository-relative benchmark data failures, and four missing frontend metadata/deployment failures.

frontend_metadata.notes: The integer wall timer reported 0 seconds (<1 second).

routing_existing.command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests -q -o addopts= --ignore=tests/test_phase42_baseline_contracts.py -k "routing or route"

clarification_unsupported_existing.command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests -q -o addopts= --ignore=tests/test_phase42_baseline_contracts.py -k "clarification or unsupported or refusal"

clarification.caveat: Precision/recall describe the curated evaluated sets, not an estimate over arbitrary user traffic.

benchmark_inventory.note: These are existing derived-style regression artifacts; they are not the new independent Phase 42 oracle set.

pychrono.current_behavior: No executable scene; current adapter remains unavailable/manual_required only.

optional_dependency_baseline.pint_artifact_backend: Existing routing artifact used shim; fresh runner installed Pint but did not separately instrument the units backend.

known_existing_issues.impact: Generated sqlite/cache/node_modules artifacts were not protected and repository tests could fail.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Added the minimum root .gitignore; no code logic change.

known_existing_issues.impact: One of 100 Phase 10 Korean cases computes f = 0.796 Hz with the expected spring solver but the solve response is not accepted as ok.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Recorded only; solver/verification changes are Phase 43+.

known_existing_issues.impact: Six unfiltered tests fail from repository root because they resolve tests/benchmarks relative to the backend working directory.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Recorded exact failures; no test-path refactor in Phase 42.

known_existing_issues.impact: Four unfiltered deployment/frontend tests fail because frontend/.env.example and frontend/.nvmrc are absent (including the aggregate Phase 24 audit).
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Recorded only; frontend was not changed.

known_existing_issues.impact: The solver computes v=omega*r, but answer-consistency compares requested v_t with answer symbol v and returns evidence-confirm clarification.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Golden status and capability limitation recorded; no validator change.

known_existing_issues.impact: Requested goal/ paths do not match repository paths.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Report only; do not move files in this phase.

known_existing_issues.impact: The latest upload replaced the prior project README content.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Report only; restoration is outside Phase 42.

known_existing_issues.impact: python -m pytest backend/tests -q inherits backend/pytest.ini exclusions.
known_existing_issues.phase42_action: Ran and reported both requested and unfiltered commands.
Used an isolated branch runner and recorded the exact environment.

metrics_not_currently_measurable.reason: No representative production traffic corpus or labels exist.
Only curated crafted/negative sets are labeled.

metrics_not_currently_measurable.metric: production or Windows-host mean/P95 solve latency
metrics_not_currently_measurable.reason: The measured 9.64 ms mean and 33.23 ms P95 are laboratory values from GitHub Actions; the local Windows host denied process creation and no production telemetry exists.
PyChrono is not installed and the current adapter does not execute numeric scenes.

phase10_korean_quality.failure: One spring-mass frequency case routes and computes f = 0.796 Hz but is not accepted as ok by the current response/verification contract.

performance_baseline.environment: GitHub Actions Linux 6.17 Azure x86_64, CPython 3.13.14
performance_baseline.optional_dependency_absence_method: A meta-path gate blocked imports of chrono, pychrono, pydy, and scipy before engine import; installed packages were not uninstalled.
